body:
## الهدف · Goal
سدّ الفجوة بين موقع **يبدو** فخماً وموقع **حقيقي** يلتقط عملاء فعليين — مع احترام عقيدة Dealix (`no_overclaim`, `no_fake_proof`, `no_scraping`).

Close the gap between an impressive-*looking* site and a *real* one that captures actual leads, while honoring Dealix doctrine.

---

## التشخيص الجذري · Root diagnosis
الموقع كان فيه ثلاث فجوات بين الواجهة والحقيقة:
1. **إثباتات مفبركة** — شعارات عملاء وهميين، أرقام مخترعة (500 عميل / 3.2x / 99.9%)، شهادات بأسماء غير حقيقية (تخالف `no_overclaim`).
2. **نموذج لا يرسل شيئاً** — `setEmailSubmitted(true)` محلي فقط → **صفر عملاء** من الموقع.
3. روابط تسعير مكسورة (`/contact`, `/offer/retainer` = 404) ولا يوجد nav علوي ولا صفحة "حلول مخصصة".

---

## ما تم إنجازه · What changed

### 🏠 الصفحة الرئيسية (`CommercialLaunchHome.tsx`)
- إزالة **كل** المحتوى المفبرك واستبداله بـ: حقائق منتج صحيحة (7 أيام تشخيص · 8 بوابات حوكمة · AR+EN · PDPL)، شريط قطاعات B2B السعودية، قسم "كيف نعمل" (3 خطوات)، وتأطير صادق "مرحلة الإطلاق".
- **توصيل نموذج البريد فعلياً** (كان محلياً فقط).
- إضافة **شريط تنقّل علوي** (كان غائباً) + إصلاح روابط الأسعار المكسورة + قسم الحلول المخصصة.

### 🆕 صفحات جديدة
- **`/[locale]/custom`** — كتالوج الحلول المخصصة (مطابق لـ `os/03_OFFERS.yml`) + نموذج منظّم (النظام/الميزانية/المدة/التحدّي/التواصل). هذا هو طلب "عندي كوستم وش يبي نسوي".
- **`/[locale]/contact`** — نموذج تواصل كامل مع تعبئة مسبقة `?email=&plan=`.

### 🔌 التقاط العملاء (مُتحقَّق E2E)
- باك إند: `POST /api/v1/public/early-access` (التقاط بريد خفيف + honeypot).
- وسيطان same-origin في Next: `/api/lead` و `/api/early-access` (يحلّان CORS، يبقيان عنوان الـ API على الخادم، مع احتياطي Calendly).
- **سلسلة مثبتة:** المتصفح → `/api/early-access` → `/api/v1/public/early-access` → `var/lead-inbox.jsonl` (عدد العملاء نما 2 → 4 في اختبار التكامل).

### 📄 وثائق
- `docs/DEALIX_LAUNCH_REALITY_AR.md` — **المصدر الصادق الوحيد**: ما هو حقيقي مُتحقَّق منه، ما أُصلح، العوائق المتبقية الحقيقية، ومسار 30/60/90.
- ورقة بحث واستهداف ICP (بدون شركات أو جهات اتصال مُختلقة).

---

## ✅ التحقق · Verification
| البند | النتيجة |
|---|---|
| بناء الواجهة | ✅ `npm run build` — 28+ صفحة شاملة المسارات الجديدة |
| استيراد الباك إند | ✅ 944 endpoint |
| التقاط العملاء E2E | ✅ المتصفح → الوسيط → الـ API → ملف الصندوق |
| التزام العقيدة | ✅ لا اختلاق، لا إرسال آلي، لا scraping |

---

## ⏭️ ما يتطلب المؤسس (خارج الكود) · Founder action (out of code scope)
1. **النشر**: اضبط `DEALIX_API_URL` واربط النطاق ليصبح الموقع حيّاً.
2. **العملاء الحقيقيون**: املأ ورقة الاستهداف بأسماء من شبكتك (لم — ولن — أختلق جهات اتصال).

التفاصيل الكاملة في `docs/DEALIX_LAUNCH_REALITY_AR.md`.

🤖 Draft — جاهز للمراجعة.

---
_Generated by [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code/session_019JVxrX5q2WKchSDspSbPPa)_

commits.messageBody:
…I flow, contact page

Closes the gap between an impressive-looking site and a real one.

Homepage (CommercialLaunchHome):
- Remove fabricated proof that violated no_overclaim: fake client logos
  ("Trusted by"), invented stats (500 clients / 3.2x / 99.9%), fake
  testimonials with non-real names.
- Replace with TRUE product facts (7-day diagnostic, 8 governance gates,
  AR+EN, PDPL-native), a Saudi B2B sector strip, a 3-step "how it works",
  and honest "founding cohort" launch framing.
- Wire hero + CTA email forms to a REAL capture chain (was local-only state).
- Add top navigation (was entirely missing) and fix broken pricing CTAs.
- Add a Custom AI section linking to the new /custom page.

New pages:
- /[locale]/custom — bespoke AI catalog (mirrors os/03_OFFERS.yml) + a
  structured intake (system, budget, timeline, challenge, contact).
- /[locale]/contact — full lead form with ?email / ?plan prefill.

Lead capture (verified end-to-end):
- Backend: POST /api/v1/public/early-access (lightweight email-only capture
  + honeypot) persisting to the founder lead-inbox.
- Same-origin Next routes /api/lead and /api/early-access (no CORS, keep the
  API base server-side, graceful Calendly fallback so no lead hits a dead end).
- E2E proven: browser -> /api/early-access -> /api/v1/public/early-access ->
  var/lead-inbox.jsonl (lead count grew 2 -> 4 in the integration test).

Docs:
- docs/DEALIX_LAUNCH_REALITY_AR.md — single honest source of truth: what is
  verified-real today, what was fixed, the real remaining obstacles, and the
  30/60/90 path.
- ICP target research worksheet (no fabricated companies/contacts).

Verified: frontend builds (28+ pages incl. new routes), backend imports
(944 routes), lead capture works end-to-end.

https://claude.ai/code/session_019JVxrX5q2WKchSDspSbPPa
commits.messageHeadline: feat(gtm): real & honest public site — working lead capture, custom-A…

commits.messageBody:
…og-injection)

CodeQL flagged the early_access log line (and the same pattern exists in
demo_request / partner_application): user-provided email/source/company
values flowed into log.info, allowing forged or flooded log lines via
crafted CR/LF input.

Add a _safe_log() helper that strips non-printable/control characters and
caps length, and apply it to every user-derived value logged in this router.

Verified: malicious source "x\r\nFAKE..." is logged as "xFAKE..." (no
newline); endpoints still return 200.

https://claude.ai/code/session_019JVxrX5q2WKchSDspSbPPa
commits.messageHeadline: fix(security): sanitize user input in public-router logs (CodeQL py/l…

commits.messageBody:
…ction, definitive)

The previous _safe_log() sanitizer was not recognized as a barrier by
CodeQL, so 8 log-injection alerts persisted on the wrapped values. Remove
user-controlled strings (email/company/sector/source/type/clients) from log
statements entirely and log only the server-generated lead_id plus derived
booleans. This eliminates the taint flow to the sink outright — and is also
better PDPL/PII hygiene (no emails/phones in application logs). The full
record stays in the lead-inbox (retrievable by lead_id).

https://claude.ai/code/session_019JVxrX5q2WKchSDspSbPPa
commits.messageHeadline: fix(security): stop logging user-provided strings (CodeQL py/log-inje…

commits.messageBody:
Both jobs failed before scanning anything, unrelated to PR changes:
- Trivy: action ref aquasecurity/trivy-action@0.24.0 was yanked / can't
  resolve. Bump to @master (consistent with docker-build.yml).
- Gitleaks: gitleaks/gitleaks-action@v2 requires a paid GITLEAKS_LICENSE
  org secret. Replace with the free OSS gitleaks CLI (docker) using the
  repo's own .gitleaks.toml allowlist — keeps a real secret scan, no license.

https://claude.ai/code/session_019JVxrX5q2WKchSDspSbPPa

The newly-working OSS gitleaks scan surfaced 16 findings — all verified false
positives (gitleaks never actually ran before; it was license-blocked):
- 13 fake keys in tests/ (the suite intentionally tests secret-scrubbing,
  auth flows, and payment fixtures) → broaden allowlist from tests/fixtures/
  to all of tests/.
- 2 ops scripts use ${MOYASAR_SECRET_KEY}/${MOYASAR_KEY} env-var references
  read from env at runtime, not literal keys → allowlist those two scripts
  plus a ${...KEY...} env-ref regex.
- 1 in api/routers/pricing.py:250 is "ttl_seconds=30 * 86400" (TTL math)
  → inline gitleaks:allow.

No real secrets were found. Verified: ruff clean, .gitleaks.toml parses,
pricing.py imports.

https://claude.ai/code/session_019JVxrX5q2WKchSDspSbPPa
commits.messageHeadline: fix(ci): tune gitleaks allowlist for confirmed false positives

commits.messageBody:
…Trivy to vuln

Once the Trivy action ref was fixed it actually ran for the first time and
surfaced real, pre-existing CRITICAL/HIGH CVEs in next@15.1.3 (both frontend
and apps/web):
- CVE-2025-29927 (CRITICAL) middleware authorization bypass
- CVE-2025-55182 (CRITICAL) RSC pre-auth RCE via unsafe deserialization
- CVE-2025-49826 + CVE-2026-44573/44578/44579 (HIGH) DoS / SSRF / info-disclosure

Upgrade next (and eslint-config-next) to ^15.5.19 — latest patched 15.x,
covering every listed advisory. Both apps rebuilt clean and verified
(frontend incl. new /contact and /custom routes; apps/web full build).

Also scope Trivy to `scanners: vuln`: its secret scanner false-positived on
grep patterns (sk_live_*) inside verify scripts, and secret scanning is
already covered by the Gitleaks job.

https://claude.ai/code/session_019JVxrX5q2WKchSDspSbPPa

title: feat(gtm): موقع حقيقي وصادق — التقاط عملاء فعلي + صفحة حلول مخصصة + تواصل
